title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Bladder Infection
description: Equisetum arvense tinctures contains several bioactive constituents, including saponins, flavonoids, and caffeic acid. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and irritation in the bladder. The tannins and flavonoids also have antimicrobial properties, making it difficult for bacteria to attach to the bladder walls and cause infection.
